texto: Look at a day when you are supremely satisfied at the end. It's not a day when you lounge around doing nothing
autor: it's a day you've had everything to do and you've done it.
explicacao: Citação de it's a day you've had everything to do and you've done it. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Look at a day when you are supremely satisfied at the end. It's not a day when you lounge around …” articula reflexao, margaret-thatcher, supremely em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
